'''Larjh StarCorporation''' was a corporation that specialized in the manufacture of custom space [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]] and suborbital [[Transport/Legends|transports]]. A subsidiary of [[zZip Product Concepts Limited]],<ref name="HSCS" /> Larjh StarCorporation maintained a dealership aboard the luxury gambling liner ''[[Cal Ambre]]''. The shop was located on the main mall level, next to [[Callia's]].<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>
